name: update_rows
description: Update existing rows in a Supabase database table that match filter conditions. Supports partial updates (only specified columns are changed). Use PostgREST filter operators in query parameters to target specific rows. Returns modified rows when requested.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: The name of the database table to update.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object with column names and new values to set.

parameters.name: column.filter
parameters.description: Filter to select which rows to update. Uses PostgREST operators (eq, neq, gt, in, etc.).

parameters.name: Prefer
parameters.description: Set to 'return=representation' to return the updated row(s) in the response.
